packageRules.description: Commit every GitHub Actions workflow dependency (action uses:, runner images, workflow Docker images) as `ci(deps):` instead of inheriting a release-triggering `fix:`. Must be extended AFTER semanticCommitType(*, fix): Renovate has no rule specificity, so the last matching packageRule wins.

Also recolor runner-image bumps from the githubMatrixRunners custom manager (and built-in `runs-on:` runners) to `ci`. Matched via the shared `github-runners` datasource because the matrix manager is a custom.regex manager, not github-actions.
